description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of shoes is one reason why we love the summer! This season, peep toes and beaded thongs work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 1.75"Product DetailsPeep toed shoe with plaid inner, has a metal embellishment with tucks at the forefootSoft footbed with printed brandingTPU outsole with a short block heelHas grooves at the forefoot and heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
